vulnerabilities.description: secureXMLDecoder uses LimitedReader.N which silently truncates XML at 10MB without returning error. Malformed large payloads could be parsed as valid shorter documents.
vulnerabilities.fix: Return explicit error when size limit is exceeded instead of silent truncation

vulnerabilities.description: Role-based access control uses string literals ('admin', 'platform_admin') without centralized constants. Inconsistent comparison could lead to authorization bypass.
vulnerabilities.fix: Define centralized role constants and use typed enums for role validation

vulnerabilities.description: No mechanism to detect token compromise or revoke refresh tokens. 48-hour window allows unlimited use if token is stolen.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement token rotation, refresh token jti/blacklist, and device fingerprinting

vulnerabilities.description: AutoCookieSecurity uses strings.Contains for env check. 'staging-production' would match and apply production settings incorrectly.
No rate limiting on authentication endpoints. Brute force attacks on login/refresh are possible.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement rate limiting middleware for /auth/* endpoints

vulnerabilities.description: TenantID extracted from JWT but not validated against database before use in most handlers. Potential IDOR if stale claims.
vulnerabilities.fix: Validate tenant exists and user has access in RequireTenant mode

vulnerabilities.description: Missing Domain attribute in CookieSecurity. Cookies may leak to subdomains in multi-tenant deployments.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add explicit Domain configuration; default to empty (current host only)

owasp_checks.detail: RBUC issues: role string literals, lack of centralized tenant validation, skip paths need audit
Argon2id used correctly, SHA-1 removed in SAML, Secure/HttpOnly cookies enforced
XXE prevented with size limits, but silent truncation needs fix
No token revocation, missing rate limiting, session hijacking detection absent
Env detection uses Contains instead of exact match
Strong password hashing, but missing rate limiting and MFA enforcement

critical_fixes: 1. Fix AutoCookieSecurity env detection to use exact match
2. Add rate limiting for authentication endpoints
3. Implement refresh token rotation and revocation
4. Add centralized role constants and consistent validation
5. Fix XML decoder to error on size limit instead of truncate
